subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was indeed a missive of distinction, and thy words gave full expression to the thoughts concealed within [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما نامی بود و تحریر تقریر ما فی الضمیر مضمون مشحون
subcodes.subjects: @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
